title: Privacy analytics for ciamac.com
notes: Decided: no analytics. Not even privacy-respecting ones. The cost of knowing who visits exceeds the value of knowing. The gallery is published and that's the contract.
next_action: Done. Pin this decision so the question doesn't keep reopening.
last_session_summary: Exited the question. The repeated re-litigation was the symptom; the decision is the cure.
